title: Senior Investment Banker at HDFC Bank

jsonLd.title: Senior Investment Banker at HDFC Bank
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with HDFC Bank! We are hiring a Investment Banker for our Jodhpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About HDFC Bank:
HDFC Bank is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HDFC Bank!
